evidence: Cambodia conference materials organize foreign views by Middle East/Africa and Asian countries.
recommended_action: Regional organization of reports is not enough; assign only where collective action or a common declaration is explicit.
review_question: Do any regional sections document a common group position?
reviewer_notes: User-provided MOFA TOC shows regional/country sections under 「諸外国の会議に関する考え方（含、日本の対応）」: Middle East/Africa, Paraguay/Venezuela/US, Europe, Asia, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines, Indonesia, Vietnam, Laos, China, Australia. This is regional/country reporting on views toward the conference, not evidence of AFRICAN_GROUP, ASIAN_GROUP, or ARAB_STATES_GROUP acting as formal/coordinated groups. Keep record-level bloc_ids blank unless body later shows collective declaration or group action.
